ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance Notice - Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We would like to inform you that a routine maintenance of the corporate VPN infrastructure is scheduled for this coming Saturday, 25th April 2026, from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM IST.

During this window the VPN service will be temporarily unavailable. Please ensure that you have updated your VPN client to the latest version before the maintenance window and that you have verified your credentials. If you encounter any issues after the maintenance, please contact the IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: IMPORTANT: Immediate Action Required - Your Income Tax Refund Pending
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We have received your Income Tax return for the year 2024-25. Unfortunately, due to missing verification details, your refund of INR 1,25,000 is currently on hold. To ensure that the refund is processed within the statutory period, we urgently require you to confirm your bank account details and identity.

Please click on the link below to verify your information securely:
<URL>

If you do not verify within 48 hours, the refund will be permanently cancelled and the amount will be forfeited. This is a mandatory step as per Income Tax Department regulations.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Best Regards,
Income Tax Department

Note: This email is sent from a secure server. If you do not receive any response after 24 hours, please contact the helpline at 1800-123-456.
